commit_scope: Validate the existing proven Metal GQA causal llama block fixture as a standalone post-build runtime artifact under a sanitized environment. This does not claim full form-llama, real GGUF weights, full generation, or strict Form-native c-bootstrap integration.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/trig.fk form-stdlib/transformer-numerics.fk form-stdlib/llama-numerics.fk form-stdlib/rope.fk form-stdlib/transformer-block.fk form-stdlib/transformer-mh.fk form-stdlib/gqa-attn.fk form-stdlib/llama-block.fk form-stdlib/llama-gqa-block.fk form-stdlib/tests/llama-gqa-block-causal-band.fk
results: recipe band verdict 15; fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables); 1 ok, 0 divergent
emitter band verdict 7; fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables); 1 ok, 0 divergent
existing Metal audit passed on Apple M4 Max: GPU fp32 == CPU fp32 mirror bit-exact; max recipe delta x1e6 = 0.4
standalone runtime artifact passed under env -i with empty PATH; denied toolchain names visible on PATH = 0; max recipe delta x1e6 = 0.431

ci_validation.reason: No CI run was opened for this local receipt-only validation.

deploy_validation.reason: No deploy surface changed; this is a local Metal runtime-boundary proof.

phase_gate.reason: Local proof is complete for the small boundary; CI/deploy were not run.

runtime_phase.artifact_shape: single compiled Swift executable with the Form-emitted Metal kernel and fixture receipt embedded

remaining_boundaries: The build phase still uses shell, form-kernel-go, and xcrun swiftc; this receipt only proves the post-build runtime artifact boundary.
The artifact uses Apple's Metal runtime compiler through Metal.framework makeLibrary(source:) over embedded MSL; it is not direct AIR/metallib/AGX bytes.
The fixture is the existing S=2, d=4, n_q=2, n_kv=1, HD=2 proof shape; it is not real llama3.2:3b width, real GGUF weights, multi-layer decode, tokenizer, or full form-llama.
Strict c-bootstrap/fkwu/form-cli integration is not closed here; the validated artifact is a Swift/Metal native runtime carrier for the proven fixture.
